note: M12g (F5) — wall height projection (R_RenderSegLoop top/bottom). reference_model.view_z (= floor + VIEWHEIGHT=41, flat-level eye) + wall_screen_span (screen rows top/bottom = CENTERY - worldtop/bottom*scale; worldX = ceil/floor - viewz, 16.16). Signedness via _signed on the fixed_mul products so negative worldbottom projects below the horizon. Rows may be off-screen (M12h clips).
validation: square-room sector (ceil 128, floor 0, viewz 41): far wall (scale 0.25) -> (28,60) brackets CENTERY=50; near wall (scale ~1.43) -> (-75,108) overfills
